{{Infobox artifact
| name = Titan Core
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan Core]] is located to the west.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan Core]] was fed upon by the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Titan Core]]'s light had been flickering since the [[Dreadgod]] consumed most of its power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
